case_title: BAKER RECOVERY SERVICES VS. SARAH CORDENILLO AKA SARAH MOYRONG et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF JUANA TREJO RE: REDUCED FILING FEE FOR ASSIGNEE OF RECORD FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAKER RECOVERY SERVICES
DECLARATION OF JUANA TREJO PURSUANT TO CCP 1033, 585, AND 116.420 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAKER RECOVERY SERVICES

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAKER RECOVERY SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SARAH CORDENILLO AKA SARAH MOYRONG $1,288.09 PRINCIPAL, $375.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $342.30 INTEREST, $271.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,276.39, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SARAH CORDENILLO AKA SARAH MOYRONG
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAKER RECOVERY SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT SARAH CORDENILLO AKA SARAH MOYRONG
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SARAH CORDENILLO AKA SARAH MOYRONG

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAKER RECOVERY SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT SARAH CORDENILLO AKA SARAH MOYRONG DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-24-2012

RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAKER RECOVERY SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT SARAH CORDENILLO AKA SARAH MOYRONG
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
